channel.title: Linux on Kumar Vipin Yadav
channel.description: Recent content in Linux on Kumar Vipin Yadav

item.title: Linux And My Experience
item.description: Well, I start using Linux since last 2 years and i became hooked, I haven’t try too many Linux distros But I like Fedora, Many things have drawn me to Linux. I am constantly amazed at the large selection of high quality distros available to people for free. And I found stability and security which is on-par or even superior to that of Mac OS X. It is fun to became the super-user, It’s like having power to do anything,
